## AbstractModelClass.findById() method

Finds a single document in the database by its ID.

**Signature:**

```typescript
static findById(id: IDBValidKey, options?: QueryFindByIdOptions): Query<any, any>;
```

## Parameters

<table><thead><tr><th>

Parameter


</th><th>

Type


</th><th>

Description


</th></tr></thead>
<tbody><tr><td>

id


</td><td>

IDBValidKey


</td><td>

The ID of the document to find.


</td></tr>
<tr><td>

options


</td><td>

QueryFindByIdOptions


</td><td>

_(Optional)_ Optional settings for the findById operation.


</td></tr>
</tbody></table>

**Returns:**

Query&lt;any, any&gt;

A promise that resolves with the document that matches the specified ID, or `undefined` if no document is found.

## Example


```ts
const user = await UserModel.findById('123');
console.log(user);
```
